title: fumana glutinosa var. juniperina
intro: Fumana glutinosa var. juniperina, also known as a variety of the White Rockrose, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fumana glutinosa var. juniperina include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
